mainEntity.name: Can non-auditory effects like stress from noise support my Utah hearing comp claim?
mainEntity.text: Can non-auditory effects like stress from noise support my Utah hearing comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Primary claims focus on NIHL per Utah Code 34A-2-503, but associated stress/cardiovascular issues may qualify as separate occupational diseases if causally linked to noise exposure.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah comp covers NIHL directly, but WHO/CDC-linked effects (hypertension, tinnitus) can bolster or form parallel claims. Evidence needed via medical nexus. Insurers resist 'secondary' damages; comprehensive evals prove totality. Valuable for higher settlements in Boise-area cases.[1]

name: Claiming Stress from Workplace Noise in Utah
description: Primary claims focus on NIHL per Utah Code 34A-2-503, but associated stress/cardiovascular issues may qualify as separate occupational diseases if causally link
